raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX we have contacted XXXX by XXXX who is an officiant to get me and my fiance married on XX/XX/XXXX and she was available and her fees were {$300.00}. We have proceeded with the down payment of {$150.00} that date XX/XX/XXXX and another payment of {$150.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. The venue we agreed on has some issues so we choose to go with a different venue ; However we could only find space available on XX/XX/XXXX ; so we informed XXXX XXXX about it 3 days later on XX/XX/XXXX that we had changed the venue and requested to get us married on XX/XX/XXXX instead of XXXX, unfortunately she was unavailable and refused to refunded us our money that we paid couple days earlier.
